name: Cribl Alert Intelligence
description: Ingests enriched security alerts from Cribl Stream, deduplicates issues, scores likely impact, and routes cases to the appropriate resolver group.

scheduled_jobs.name: Cribl Auto-Close Stale Cases
scheduled_jobs.description: Closes informational cases older than 7 days with no activity

roles.name: x_cribl_alert_intel.admin
roles.description: Full administrative access to Cribl Alert Intelligence

roles.name: x_cribl_alert_intel.analyst
roles.description: Can view, triage, and resolve alert cases

roles.name: x_cribl_alert_intel.api
roles.description: Service account role for Cribl ingest API access

system_properties.name: x_cribl.dedup_window_hours
system_properties.description: Time window in hours for event deduplication

system_properties.name: x_cribl.auto_close_days
system_properties.description: Days after which informational cases are auto-closed

system_properties.name: x_cribl.escalation_threshold
system_properties.description: Impact score threshold for automatic escalation

system_properties.name: x_cribl.hmac_secret
system_properties.description: Shared HMAC secret for authenticating Cribl webhook requests
